nasb.text: So Moses and Eleazar the priest spoke with them in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying,

esv.text: And Moses and Eleazar the priest spoke with them in the plains of Moab by the Jordan at Jericho, saying,

cnv.text: 於是，摩西和以利亞撒祭司在摩押曠野，就是在耶利哥附近的約旦河邊，告訴他們：

ccb.text: 摩西和以利亚撒祭司就在约旦河边、耶利哥对面的摩押平原对以色列人说：
